name: Mighty & Crafty Filling Chamber Tool Set
summary: The Mighty & Crafty Filling Chamber Tool Set is compatible with both the Crafty Plus portable vaporiser from Storz & Bickel and the Mighty vaporiser.
description: The Mighty & Crafty Filling Chamber Tool Set is compatible with both the Crafty Plus portable vaporiser from Storz & Bickel and the Mighty vaporiser. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
